race.comment: SIZZLEIST (13) has a handy record over this sprint journey with a win and five placings from just seven attempts and brings NSW formlines to the table. Gets in on the minimum weight and should give backers a sight. FORTYSECONDSTREET (7) is drawn to get a cosy run in transit from the inside alley and winning rider Thompson sticks in the irons. Top-three aspirations. HANNABANA (11) has been out of the placings in two runs since a break, the latest when fifth, beaten 1.75 lengths, over 1200m at this track after she was in contention on the bend. Will strip fitter and is capable of sharp improvement. KILONOVA (9) returned from a spell with a sound second last start over 870m at Toowoomba. Strips fitter and is a key runner.
